access_key.description: Access key of the API key.

secret_key.description: Secret key of the API Key.

application_id.description: ID of application that bears the API key.

user_id.description: ID of user that bears the API key.

created_at.description: Date and time of API key creation. (RFC 3339 format)

updated_at.description: Date and time of last API key update. (RFC 3339 format)

expires_at.description: Date and time of API key expiration. (RFC 3339 format)

default_project_id.description: Default Project ID specified for this API key.

editable.description: Defines whether or not the API key is editable.

deletable.description: Defines whether or not the API key is deletable.

managed.description: Defines whether or not the API key is managed.

creation_ip.description: IP address of the device that created the API key.
